REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1012 Brazil Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Catherine Banti for Cathy Clinton.

The sale was confirmed at $475,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $277,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harrison.

Petition For Authority To Sell Conservatee'S Residence And To Authorize Trustee To Execute A Residential Listing Agreement (Exclusive Authorization And Right To Sell) With Real Estate Broker/Agent
Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearanes: Court-Appointed Counsel Pauline Sloan for Omer L. Matthews (Conservatee). Catherine Banti appeared by Court Call for and with Cathy Clinton who also appeared by Court Call.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the petition and Ms. Banti's declaration, that Ms. Banti's declaration was stapled to the proposed order, and that her declaraion has now been filed. Ms. Sloan stated that there was no objection. The Court granted the petition (per review of the written order). Ms. Sloan stated that there wasn't any reason for her to stay on, that Cathy Clinton has hired a case manager, and that there is a good company handling the sale. Ms. Banti concurred with Ms. Sloan. The Court stated that discharge seems appropriate now since things have stabilized and that no reason remains to keep Court-Appointed Counsel in place.

Ms. Sloan was discharged and is to submit her ex-parte petition for discharge and fees.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal And Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal And Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Continued To Nov-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Assets In Trust And In Trust And Directing Conservator To Transfer Pro
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pauline Sloan Court appointed Counsel for Omer Matthews (Conservatee). Catherine Banti appeared by telephone for Cathy Clinton (Trustee/Conservator).

Ms. Banti stated that the principal place of the trust administration and that the trust asset was in San Francisco, and that the Trustee spent a significant amount of time working with the property. In addition, Ms. Banti stated that the property was always part of the Trust, that it was put into a by-pass trust, that it was taken out of the Trust for financing purposes and that it never got put back in, and that the property was in Mr. Matthews' name alone. Furthermore, Ms. Banti stated that they did not act sooner due to Mr. Matthews' health issues, that they had no objection to the Court supervising the sale of the property but that the Court should not have continued supervision of the trust, that the Trustee has prepared the house for sale and that they wanted to put the property into the trust so that the property would not end up in probate. Ms. Sloan also stated that all activity took place in San Francisco, reported as to the Conservatee's medical condition, stated that they needed to get the property on the market immediately, that the proceeds would eventually go into the conservatorship, that they should sell the property in the conservatorship with Court confirmation and that there was no reason to take the trust under Court supervision. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
